purpose: Strict source-unit manifest for training command effects 0-34.
rules: Training effect completion requires original COMF behavior implementation, not static profile/indexing.
Each command/source unit must identify source evidence, runtime consumer, result owner, and verification.
Intermediate COMF/SOURCE/LOSEBASE/EXP/PALAM/TEQUIP/TFLAG values must not leak into save payload.
Train.csv command rows and extra COMF source files must both be accounted for.

requiredBeforeCompleted: all active Train.csv commands in range have implemented runtime effect calculation
all extra COMF files are implemented, approved-excluded, or explicitly transferred

notes: M30 inbound special training item source units for command 0-34 effects must be implemented or explicitly excluded by the M42 training-effect owner before M42 can close.
Existing M42 closure is blocked; this manifest preserves that status and makes each command an explicit blocked unit.

units.requiredBehavior: Implement original command effect calculation from COMF source, not only SOURCE/LOSEBASE/EXP indexing.
units.runtimeConsumerId: training effect profile -> definitions.trainingCommands -> calculateTrainingResult -> session preview buffers -> applyTrainingResult body/people owners
units.blockerReason: M42 responsibility requires original command effect calculation, not only SOURCE/LOSEBASE/EXP line indexing and generated static profiles.

units.requiredBehavior: Item 200 is consumed by COMF10.ERB and later COMF90/91/92.ERB effect scripts, not by item-use confirmation. M42 owns the first training-effect command owner record; M44 must still cover later out-of-range consumers.
units.blockerReason: Inbound responsibility from M30 approved exclusion. Item 200 is consumed by COMF10.ERB and later COMF90/91/92.ERB effect scripts, not by item-use confirmation. M42 owns the first training-effect command owner record; M44 must still cover later out-of-range consumers. This receiving milestone must implement it, approve exclusion, or redesign ownership before completion.
